meta.poznamky: Seřaď bloky pro 3-zubý hřeben bez smyčky. Správné pořadí: [forward(40), backward(40), penUp, right(90), forward(20), left(90), penDown] × 3, ale poslední skupina bez penUp/přesunu (jen forward(40), backward(40) na konci). Bloky jsou rozházeny v workspace — student je musí správně seřadit a spojit.

cms.task_text: Bloky pro kreslení [hlp]sloupů[/hlp] jsou rozhozeny. Seřaďte je do správného pořadí.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="s1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_backward" id="s2" x="180" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="s3" x="340" y="20"></block><block type="turtle_right" id="s4" x="20" y="120"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="s5" x="180" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block><block type="turtle_left" id="s6" x="340" y="120"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="s7" x="20" y="220"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="s8" x="180" y="220"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_backward" id="s9" x="340" y="220"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="s10" x="20" y="320"></block><block type="turtle_right" id="s11" x="180" y="320"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="s12" x="340" y="320"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block><block type="turtle_left" id="s13" x="20" y="420"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="s14" x="180" y="420"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="s15" x="340" y="420"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_backward" id="s16" x="20" y="520"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></xml>
